flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Portland State University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (15.7k → 13.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Portland State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.4k → $11.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Portland State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Portland State University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (28.8% → 34.0%).
